title: Arox's Favorite Mod
description: This mod adds just about anything, from cursed sandwiches to questionable dimensions.
body:
**This is the everything mod!**
A lot of the stuff in this mod originated from jokes in AroxAgain's Discord server, hence the name.

So far; this mod adds 3 dimensions, several new consumable items, 3 new gear sets, 2 new wood sets, some new mobs, a new villager profession, a new boss, guns, etc. Perfect for goofy/joke modpacks!

**Disclaimer: Going in any dimensions added by this mod with shaders enabled will destroy your FPS.**

Subscribe to my YouTube channel! https://www.youtube.com/@therealGecko_KingYT
